ggconsort 0.2.0
  • Reference

    • PRISMA flow diagrams with ggconsort
  • Changelog

Minimal theme for CONSORT diagrams

Source: R/ggplot-consort.R
theme_consort.Rd

A wrapper around ggplot2::theme_void() that adds plot margins, so diagram boxes near the edges are not clipped.

theme_consort(margin_h = 0, margin_v = 0, margin_unit = "line")

Arguments

margin_h, margin_v

Horizontal and vertical plot margins.

margin_unit

Unit of the margins, passed to ggplot2::margin().

Value

A ggplot2 theme object.

Examples

# see ?geom_consort for a complete diagram example
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_consort(margin_h = 8, margin_v = 1)

Contents
